title: Lane Expansion Portal Deck
summary: Worlds Launch now shows compact future lane and minigame sockets using a generated portal-deck texture.

verification.intent: Reduce scroll pressure by making future lane expansion visible inside the existing Worlds Launch dock.
verification.accessibility: Portal sockets reuse button semantics and existing Worlds Launch action routes.
verification.motion: Sweep and ring animations use transform/opacity and include prefers-reduced-motion coverage.
